case_title: BEAL, MARTIN vs. DWA LEGAL SERVICES, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BEAL, MARTIN AS TO DEFENDANT DWA LEGAL SERVICES, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BEAL, MARTIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DWA LEGAL SERVICES, INC. $1,841.48 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,921.48
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DWA LEGAL SERVICES, INC.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF BEAL, MARTIN
NOTICE OF THIRD PARTY ACTION ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LABOR COMMISSIONER
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $25.97 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BEAL, MARTIN
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,990.58 AS TO DEFENDANT DWA LEGAL SERVICES, INC.
